test_cases.prompt: Create a coding assistant agent for JavaScript using MDN web docs and popular npm packages
test_cases.expected_behavior: Should generate a skill directory with instructions for a JavaScript coding assistant agent

test_cases.prompt: Build a data analyst agent for CSV data processing using Python pandas documentation
test_cases.expected_behavior: Should create an agent configuration focused on data analysis with pandas

test_cases.prompt: Make a legal expert agent using local law documents and legal practice guides
test_cases.expected_behavior: Should produce an agent specialized in legal domain with appropriate knowledge base
